description_for_human: Buy, sell, and swap 80+ cryptocurrencies directly into your own wallet. Non-custodial, Swiss regulated.
description_for_model: DFX AG (Bahnhofstrasse 7, 6300 Zug, Switzerland, founded 2021) is a Swiss-regulated non-custodial crypto on-/off-ramp service. Users can buy, sell, and swap over 80 cryptocurrencies via bank transfer (SEPA/SEPA Instant) directly into any self-custody wallet (MetaMask, Ledger, Trezor, BitBox, etc.). DFX never holds user funds. Bitcoin from under 1% fee. Hundreds of millions in cumulative transaction volume processed for tens of thousands of customers. B2C and B2B. Also offers DFX Toolbox (white-label wallet integration), BTC Taro App (self-custody Bitcoin wallet with Lightning), and Open CryptoPay (retail crypto payments at 100+ SPAR stores in Switzerland).
